> > Staling -X healthcheck still FAIL

 > Could you share your script to deploy this patch? we would like to

we use the default OOM master, we overwrite the existing OOM master part dealing with the patchset then we run the traditionnal healthcheck tests.
installation: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation
tests: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap

from the controller /opt/oom/kubernetes/robot/ete-k8s.sh onap health

as the integration CI daily http://onapci.org/logs/windriver-oom-
staging-daily/238/report.html#totals?critical
(same issue 502 reproduced on integration daily stagging)
